autoreact: Bot reacts to every message in this chat
extend: Upgrade this customer's subscription by N days (sub-admins: only customers you personally approved)
venice: Ask Venice AI a question (needs VENICE_API_KEY configured)
videosearch: Search YouTube by name and send the video (or paste any link)
add: Add a member to the group by number
addcoowner: Add a co-owner (full access) by number
bio: Update the bot's WhatsApp bio/about text
checkblocked: Heuristic check whether a number has blocked the bot
convert: Convert an amount between currencies (e.g. .convert 100 USD KES)
createqr: Generate a QR code from text or a URL
download: Download a video from a URL (YouTube/TikTok)
logout: Remove your unlocked access for this session
song: Extract MP3 audio from a YouTube URL or search term
summarize: AI-summarize a block of text or a replied message
weather: Live weather info for a city
welcome: Send the welcome card to a number
accept: Approve one pending group join request by number
reject: Deny one pending group join request by number
rejectall: Deny all pending group join requests at once
acceptall: Approve all pending group join requests at once
antibadwarn: Toggle warning users before deleting their bad-word messages
antigroupmention: Toggle auto-warn when someone @-mentions the whole group
dbase: Decode a base64 string back to text
debinary: Decode binary (0s and 1s) back to text
gemini: Ask Google Gemini a question directly
gpt: Ask OpenAI GPT a question directly
gpt4: Ask OpenAI GPT-4 a question directly
killgc: Bot leaves the current group immediately (owner only)
livescore: Live match scores for a league (default EPL)
newgroup: Create a new group from a name + comma-separated numbers
pmpermitrevoke: Revoke a number's approval to DM the bot under PM-permit mode
private: Set the bot to private mode (owner & admins only)
setmode: Turn the bot on or off (.setmode on/off)
setsudo: Add a number to the sudo (sub-admin) list
delsudo: Remove a number from the sudo (sub-admin) list
standings: League table standings for a given league/season
upcomingmatches: Upcoming fixtures for a given team
resetallsettings: Reset every bot-wide setting back to defaults
resetsetting: Reset one specific bot-wide setting back to default
setantigcmentionwarnlimit: Set how many @everyone-mentions trigger a warning
addnote: Save a named note in this chat
delnote: Delete a saved note in this chat
getnote: Recall a saved note by name
getnotes: List all saved note names in this chat
delallnotes: Delete every saved note in this chat (bot admin)
admindelnote: Delete a note in any chat by JID (owner/sub-admin)
adminupdatenote: Update a note in any chat by JID (owner/sub-admin)
getsetting: Show the current value of one bot-wide setting
antidemote: Toggle auto-block of unauthorized demotions in this group
antipromote: Toggle auto-block of unauthorized promotions in this group
character: AI-analyze a mentioned/replied user's chat personality
commands: Flat alphabetical list of every currently-loaded command
credsrestore: Restore creds.json from the latest local backup (needs restart after)
credssnapshot: Manually back up creds.json right now
dare: Truth or Dare: get a dare
delmail: Discard your current disposable temp-mail address
demote: Demote a member from group admin
everyone: Tag every member in the group (alias of .tagall)
gamehistory: Show the last 10 finished games in this chat
games: List all available games and how to start them
groupsettings: Show this group's current protection/feature toggle states
hangman: Start a game of hangman (reply with letters)
kick: Remove a member from the group
megabackup: Upload creds.json session backup to Mega.nz cloud storage
megarestore: Restore the latest session backup from Mega.nz
model: Switch the AI model used in this chat (llama/llama8/mixtral/gemma)
mute: Mute the group (only admins can send messages)
mygroups: List every group the bot is currently a member of
pmpermitlist: List DM senders currently approved under PM-permit mode
profile: View your wallet balance and trust badge
promote: Promote a member to group admin
public: Set the bot to public mode (anyone can use it)
readmail: List messages waiting in your temp-mail inbox
referral: Get your referral link and track earnings
register: Get the web panel link (free credits + trust badge)
reload: Hot-reload all plugins without restarting the bot
resetgroup: Reset this group's protection settings back to defaults
runtime: Show bot uptime and system info
save: Save the replied view-once media as a file
sportnews: Latest sports news headlines for a topic (default football)
status: Post an image as the bot's WhatsApp status
sticker: Convert a replied image/video into a sticker
tagall: Tag every member in the group with a message
tempmail: Get or create your disposable email address
topscorers: Top-scorer stats (requires a paid SportsDB API tier)
truth: Truth or Dare: get a truth question
tttend: End the active Tic-Tac-Toe game in this chat
wcgend: End the active Word Chain game
wcgjoin: Join the running Word Chain game
wcgscores: Show current Word Chain leaderboard for this chat
wyr: Would You Rather — get a random prompt
toaudio: Reply to a video (or send one with this as the caption) to extract just its audio track as an MP3
